description: Sells ATM straddles (or strangles) when implied volatility is elevated relative to historical volatility, exploiting IV's tendency to revert to its mean. IV Rank is proxied as IV/HV; a ratio above 7 triggers premium-selling entries. Exits on IV compression, a time stop at 21 DTE, or a stop-loss if IV expands further.

IV_RANK_THRESHOLD.description: Minimum IV/HV ratio required to open a position. Spec mandates 7.

IV_RANK_EXTREME.description: IV/HV ratio above which position is scaled up with additional OTM short strikes.

STRANGLE_OFFSET.description: Strike offset from spot for entry. 0 = ATM straddle; positive value = OTM strangle.

IV_RANK_EXIT.description: Profit-take threshold: close position when IV/HV ratio compresses below this level.

STOP_LOSS_RATIO.description: Stop-loss threshold: close position when IV/HV ratio expands above this level.

EXIT_DTE.description: Time-based exit: close entire position when days-to-expiry are at or below this value.
